title: lilium croceum var. bulbiferum
intro: Lilium croceum var. bulbiferum, also known as the bulb-bearing yellow lily, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the lily family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its alkaloid compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Lilium croceum var. bulbiferum are made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
